Configuration.AuthNote: WildApricot uses OAuth2 with three flows: clientCredentials (API key — connector standard), password (user creds), authorizationCode (org login form SSO). For M2M connector use: POST to oauth.wildapricot.org/auth/token with grant_type=client_credentials, clientId=APIKEY, clientSecret=<api_key_value>, scope=auto.
Configuration.AccountScopedNote: All sync-eligible REST endpoints are scoped under /accounts/{accountId}/. The accountId is required in the connector credential or configuration. Token acquisition is at oauth.wildapricot.org (separate domain from api.wildapricot.org).

PaginationDefaults.note: Offset pagination enforced as of November 2025. $top capped at 100 per request. Large async results (Contacts) use RequestFinished flag with async=true + resultId pattern for subsequent fetch.
PaginationDefaults.asyncPattern: Some endpoints (Contacts, Events) support $async=true which returns a RequestFinished boolean. When false, retry with resultId parameter from response.

Configuration.IncrementalSyncNote: Contacts: $filter by "Profile last updated" timestamp (display name syntax in $filter string). Events: $filter by "Last updated". Invoices/Payments/Refunds/Donations/AuditLog: StartDate/EndDate query params (creation date range, not modification). No universal modified-since header. Per-object watermark field names vary.
Configuration.WebhooksNote: WildApricot does not expose a webhook API in the Admin API OpenAPI spec. Third-party no-code automation (Zapier/Make) can receive webhook-style notifications but these are not part of the Admin REST API surface and are out of scope for this connector.
Configuration.BulkOperationsNote: WildApricot supports a BATCH method that combines multiple API subrequests. Batch requests are limited to 5 subrequests per batch per the documented rate limit rules.
Configuration.BulkBatchPath: (documented BATCH method — exact path not specified in OpenAPI spec, referenced in help article)
Configuration.APIVersioningNote: Version encoded in the base URL: https://api.wildapricot.org/v2.3. The live spec version is 9.14.0-oas3 (semantic API version documented separately from URL path version). URL path version v2.3 is the current Admin API path prefix.
Configuration.TokenRefreshNote: OAuth2 client_credentials flow does not issue refresh tokens. Re-acquire a new Bearer token by repeating the client_credentials grant on 401 or token expiry. Tokens are short-lived (typically 30-60 minutes per observed behavior; not explicitly documented in the spec).

message.description: An explanation of why this error occurred

details.description: More information about the error. Data structure is specific for each kind of error.

httpStatusCodes.429: Too many requests from same account. Wait for a minute and try again.

universalPK.note: All WildApricot Admin API objects consistently use Id (integer) as primary key across all 28 coverable schemas. High confidence (≥95% of objects). Source: OpenAPI spec schema analysis across all coverable object types.

Configuration.CustomObjectMarkerNote: WildApricot does not expose per-tenant custom objects via the Admin API. The contact field schema IS runtime-discoverable (GET /contactfields) but custom fields are identified by IsSystem=false on ContactFieldDescription, not by a naming prefix.
Configuration.CustomFieldMarkerNote: Custom (admin-created) contact fields are identified by IsSystem=false on the ContactFieldDescription response. System fields have IsSystem=true. Custom field values are embedded in Contact.FieldValues[] array keyed by SystemCode.

WriteCapability.note: WildApricot Admin API documents POST (Create), PUT (Update), DELETE operations on most core objects. Contacts, Events, EventRegistrations, Invoices, Payments, Refunds, Tenders are writable. MembershipLevels, MemberGroups, Bundles are read-only via the API. Financial writes (invoices, payments) require explicit enablement and sandbox validation.

Configuration.ConcurrencyControlNote: No ETag, If-Match, version, or optimistic concurrency headers documented in the WildApricot Admin API OpenAPI spec. Conflict resolution must use snapshot-3-way approach. MostRecent conflict resolution is not safely applicable without versioning.
Configuration.DeleteSemanticsNote: The WildApricot Admin API DELETE operations (contacts, invoices, etc.) are hard deletes per the OpenAPI spec (no archived/soft-delete flag documented). Contact deletion is permanent. For contacts the preferred approach is status change (Lapsed/Archived) rather than DELETE — but DELETE itself removes the record. Verify per-object behavior with sandbox before enabling DeleteBehavior.
Configuration.DefaultSyncDirectionNote: Read-only (Pull) recommended for all objects. Bidirectional requires sandbox validation. Financial writes (invoices, payments) require explicit business approval. Hard-delete semantics mean orphan detection must be carefully managed before enabling DeleteBehavior.
Configuration.DefaultConflictResolutionNote: No concurrency control (ConcurrencyControl=none). MostRecent is not safely applicable. DestWins is conservative default if bidirectional sync is enabled. Validate in sandbox.

OutOfScopeObjectFamilies.reason: Not a sync data route for this connector. The Member API (api.wildapricot.org/ui/swagger/publicAccess) is a member self-service API for building member-facing apps with OAuth authorization code flow. It surfaces member-scoped views of the same data, not additional data. Admin API connector covers the full dataset.

Not a sync data route for this connector. WildApricot does not expose a webhook subscription API in the Admin API OpenAPI spec. Webhooks are configured manually in the WildApricot admin UI and are asynchronous push notifications — a separate inbound-event integration pattern, not a batch sync source.

Not a sync data route for this connector. SSO is a member authentication mechanism (OAuth authorization code flow via the WildApricot login form) for embedding member login on external websites. It identifies members but does not provide data collections to sync.

Not a sync data route for this connector. Zapier and Make are third-party no-code automation platforms with pre-built WildApricot triggers/actions. They route data through their own infrastructure and are not part of the Admin API surface. They are out of scope for a direct Admin API connector.

Not a sync data route for this connector. WildApricot widgets are JavaScript embed codes (event calendars, member directories, donation forms, login buttons) designed for embedding on external websites. They are a presentation layer, not an API data source, and are not documented in the Admin API spec.

Configuration.RPCOperationsNote: 19 RPC operations under /rpc/{accountId}/ (ApprovePendingMembership, CloneEvent, VoidInvoice, SendEmailDraft, etc.) are workflow triggers and side-effect actions, NOT sync data collections. They are informational for future action-generation but out of scope for the current sync-focused connector.

fields.Name: Account
fields.Description: Information about Wild Apricot account. REST resource /accounts. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: Name
fields.Description: The account name. This corresponds to the organization name as it appears on the Organization details screen.

fields.Name: PrimaryDomainName
fields.Description: The primary domain name for the account.

fields.Name: AttachmentData
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "AttachmentData". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/attachments/GetInfos. PK=(deferred to runtime) (defer).

fields.Name: Id
fields.Description: Universal record identifier (OpenAPI GetById path key).

fields.Name: AuditLogItem
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "AuditLogItem". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/auditLogItems. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: OrderType
fields.Description: The origin of the audit log entry.

fields.Name: Properties
fields.Description: Collection of audit log item properties that contains all technical information about transaction and other linked documents.

fields.Name: DocumentAction
fields.Description: Action performed on related document type.

fields.Name: Bundle
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "Bundle". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/bundles. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: ParticipantsCount
fields.Description: The number of members in the bundle.

fields.Name: SpacesLeft
fields.Description: If bundle size is limited, then this field indicates number of vacant spaces left in the bundle.

fields.Name: Members
fields.Description: Collection of links to members of the bundle.

fields.Name: CeuRecord
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "CeuRecord". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/ceuRecords. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: RecordStatus
fields.Description: Status of the CEU record. Pending, Cancelled, Active.

fields.Name: LastModified
fields.Description: Date the record was last modified.

fields.Name: SourceType
fields.Description: Type of the source for the CEU record.

fields.Name: StartDate
fields.Description: Start date of the CEU activity.

fields.Name: EndDate
fields.Description: End date of the CEU activity.

fields.Name: ExpiryDate
fields.Description: Expiry date of the CEU record.

fields.Name: InstructorProvider
fields.Description: Name of the instructor or provider.

fields.Name: PublicNotes
fields.Description: Public notes for the CEU record.

fields.Name: InternalNotes
fields.Description: Internal notes for the CEU record.

fields.Name: Contact
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "Contact". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/contacts. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: FirstName
fields.Description: Shortcut for custom field value with system code 'FirstName'

fields.Name: LastName
fields.Description: Shortcut for custom field value with system code 'LastName'

fields.Name: Organization
fields.Description: Shortcut for custom field value with system code 'Organization'

fields.Name: Email
fields.Description: Contact primary email, shortcut for custom field value with system code 'Email'. Should be unique in account.

fields.Name: DisplayName
fields.Description: Combination of names or organization or email. Value depends on presence of values. It could be used to display contact record on lists.

fields.Name: ProfileLastUpdated
fields.Description: Timestamp of last contact details modification. Complies with ISO8601 format. The date and time that common fields, membership fields, or member group participation were last updated for the contact.

fields.Name: MembershipEnabled
fields.Description: Indicates whether the contact is a member. A value of false indicates that the contact is a not a member or is a suspended member.

fields.Name: Status
fields.Description: The status of the contact's membership. The status is only included in the results if the contact is a member.

fields.Name: IsAccountAdministrator
fields.Description: Indicates if the contact is an account administrator.

fields.Name: TermsOfUseAccepted
fields.Description: Indicates if the contact already accepted Wild Apricot's terms of use.

fields.Name: FieldValues
fields.Description: For each custom field you have added to your Wild Apricot database, the name of the field, its system code, and its value for this contact are returned. The system code is a unique field identifier that can be used instead of the field name to identify the field. As well, a number of system fields are returned. If a custom field is restricted to certain access levels, then CustomAccessLevel indicates the level to which the field is restricted. Possible values are AdminOnly, Member, and Public.

fields.Name: ContactFieldDescription
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "ContactFieldDescription". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/contactfields. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: FieldName
fields.Description: Field name title, could be displayed in user interface. Field name could be changed by account administrator.

fields.Name: SystemCode
fields.Description: System-defined code associated with field. It does not change even if FieldName is edited in admin backend.

fields.Name: DisplayType
fields.Description: Optional hint, which tells how to display and edit field. It appears for String and Choice fields.

fields.Name: IsSystem
fields.Description: Field is system-defined and could not be deleted. However, field name could be changed by account administrator.

fields.Name: Description
fields.Description: System-defined description of the field. Empty for custom fields.

fields.Name: FieldInstructions
fields.Description: Admin-defined comment for the field. Shown as a tip when members or visitors fill in forms.

fields.Name: AllowedValues
fields.Description: If field value is limited to set of predefined values, this contains list of allowed values. Normally, AllowedValues appear for MultipleChoice and Choice fields.

fields.Name: Order
fields.Description: Sorting order to display the field in UI

fields.Name: AdminOnly
fields.Description: Indicates that the field is accessible only by administrators.

fields.Name: ExistsInLevels
fields.Description: If field is defined for specific levels only, this contains list of membership levels.

fields.Name: MemberOnly
fields.Description: Indicates whether the field is a membership field.

fields.Name: IsBuiltIn
fields.Description: The field is a built-in system field, it cannot be edited or deleted.

fields.Name: SupportSearch
fields.Description: Indicates that this field can be used in $filter expression in contact search.

fields.Name: IsEditable
fields.Description: Indicates that the field's value can be changed with create/update requests. Otherwise value can’t be edited through API. If non-editable field value is provided in create/update contact request, the value is ignored by API.

fields.Name: ProrateInApplication
fields.Description: If the field has associated cost, this indicates if the cost should be prorated over a partial period of time.

fields.Name: DigitalProduct
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "DigitalProduct". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/store/products. PK=(deferred to runtime) (defer).

fields.Name: Id
fields.Description: Universal record identifier (OpenAPI GetById path key).

fields.Name: Donation
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "Donation". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/donations. PK=(deferred to runtime) (defer).

fields.Name: Id
fields.Description: Universal record identifier (OpenAPI GetById path key).

fields.Name: Comment
fields.Description: Internal note on donation. Visible to administrators only.

fields.Name: PublicComment
fields.Description: Comment on donation. Visible to both administrators and donors.

fields.Name: PaymentMethodID
fields.Description: Identifier of the payment method, could be last digits of a credit card or cheque number, Visible to both administrators and donors.

fields.Name: FieldValues
fields.Description: For each custom field you have added to your Wild Apricot database, the name of the field, its system code, and its value for this donation are returned. The system code is a unique field identifier that can be used instead of the field name to identify the field. As well, a number of system fields are returned.

fields.Name: EmailDraft
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "EmailDraft". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/EmailDrafts. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: CreatedDate
fields.Description: Date and time when the draft was created.

fields.Name: Subject
fields.Description: Value for email subject. It may contain macros, which will be replaced before delivery.

fields.Name: Body
fields.Description: Value for email body. Usually it is HTML content with macros, which will be replaced before delivery.

fields.Name: ReplyToAddress
fields.Description: Email address to use as reply to.

fields.Name: EventId
fields.Description: Event identifier for which the draft has been started (if any).

fields.Name: IsLinkTrackingAllowed
fields.Description: Indicates if email tracking is enabled for this email.

fields.Name: LastChangedDate
fields.Description: Date and time when the draft was last modified.

fields.Name: IsScheduled
fields.Description: Indicates if draft delivery is scheduled for a particular date. See ScheduledDate value.

fields.Name: ScheduledDate
fields.Description: Date and time when the draft will be sent.

fields.Name: EmailRecipient
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "EmailRecipient". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/SentEmails. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: Id
fields.Description:
If email was sent to individual recipient, this field contains contact identifier.
If email was sent to all recipients from some saved search, this field contains saved search identifier.

fields.Name: Name
fields.Description: Display name of recipient or name of saved search.

fields.Name: Email
fields.Description: recipient email. for IndividualRecipient and SentEmailRecipient types only

fields.Name: EntityFieldDescription
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "EntityFieldDescription". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/donationfields. PK=SystemCode (documented-soft).

fields.Name: FieldName
fields.Description: Field name title, could be displayed in user interface. Field name could be changed by account administrator.

fields.Name: SystemCode
fields.Description: System-defined code associated with field. It does not change even if FieldName is edited in admin backend.

fields.Name: DisplayType
fields.Description: Optional hint, which tells how to display and edit field. It appears for String and Choice fields.

fields.Name: IsSystem
fields.Description: Field is system-defined and could not be deleted. However, field name could be changed by account administrator.

fields.Name: Description
fields.Description: System-defined description of the field. Empty for custom fields.

fields.Name: FieldInstructions
fields.Description: Admin-defined comment for the field. Shown as a tip when members or visitors fill in forms.

fields.Name: AllowedValues
fields.Description: If field value is limited to set of predefined values, this contains list of allowed values. Normally, AllowedValues appear for MultipleChoice and Choice fields.

fields.Name: Order
fields.Description: Sorting order to display the field in UI

fields.Name: EntityFieldDescriptionWithExtraCharge
fields.DisplayName: Entity Field Description With Extra Charge
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "EntityFieldDescriptionWithExtraCharge". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/donationfields. PK=SystemCode (documented-soft).

fields.Name: FieldName
fields.Description: Field name title, could be displayed in user interface. Field name could be changed by account administrator.

fields.Name: SystemCode
fields.Description: System-defined code associated with field. It does not change even if FieldName is edited in admin backend.

fields.Name: DisplayType
fields.Description: Optional hint, which tells how to display and edit field. It appears for String and Choice fields.

fields.Name: IsSystem
fields.Description: Field is system-defined and could not be deleted. However, field name could be changed by account administrator.

fields.Name: Description
fields.Description: System-defined description of the field. Empty for custom fields.

fields.Name: FieldInstructions
fields.Description: Admin-defined comment for the field. Shown as a tip when members or visitors fill in forms.

fields.Name: AllowedValues
fields.Description: If field value is limited to set of predefined values, this contains list of allowed values. Normally, AllowedValues appear for MultipleChoice and Choice fields.

fields.Name: Order
fields.Description: Sorting order to display the field in UI

fields.Name: Event
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "Event". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/events. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: EventType
fields.Description: Indicates if event is simple (RSVP) or regular.

fields.Name: StartDate
fields.Description: Date and time when the event is scheduled to start.

fields.Name: StartTimeSpecified
fields.Description: Indicates if event start time is specified. False means that StartDate contains only date component.

fields.Name: EndDate
fields.Description: Date and time when the event is scheduled to end. Could be empty.

fields.Name: EndTimeSpecified
fields.Description: Indicates if event end time is specified. False means that EndDate contains only date component.

fields.Name: Location
fields.Description: Location where the event will take place.

fields.Name: RegistrationEnabled
fields.Description: Indicates whether registration to this event is enabled

fields.Name: HasEnabledRegistrationTypes
fields.Description: Indicates that at least one registration type is enabled for this event.

fields.Name: Tags
fields.Description: A collection of tags associated with the event.

fields.Name: Sessions
fields.Description: Collection of event sessions. Exist in multisessions events only.

fields.Name: RegistrationsLimit
fields.Description: Maximum number of registrations for this event.

fields.Name: PendingRegistrationsCount
fields.Description: Number of participants already registered for this event but not confirmed yet.

fields.Name: ConfirmedRegistrationsCount
fields.Description: Number of participants already registered for this event and already confirmed.

fields.Name: CheckedInAttendeesNumber
fields.Description: Number of attendees already checked in on this event.

fields.Name: EventRegistration
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "EventRegistration". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/eventregistrations. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: RegistrationTypeId
fields.Description: Unique identifier of event registration type

fields.Name: IsCheckedIn
fields.Description: Indicates if registrant is already checked in for event.

fields.Name: RegistrationFee
fields.Description: The fee for this registration including all extra charges and taxes.

fields.Name: PaidSum
fields.Description: The sum that the registrant has already paid for the registration.

fields.Name: IsPaid
fields.Description: Indicates if the registrant has already paid for the registration.

fields.Name: RegistrationFields
fields.Description: A collection of registration fields values

fields.Name: ShowToPublic
fields.Description: Indicates whether this registration can be shown to other event registrants.

fields.Name: RegistrationDate
fields.Description: Date and time when registration was created. (Account local time)

fields.Name: Memo
fields.Description: Some additional notes about this registration.

fields.Name: IsGuestRegistration
fields.Description: Boolean. True if this is a guest registration, otherwise false.

fields.Name: OnWaitlist
fields.Description: Indicates if event registration is in waitlist.

fields.Name: RecreateInvoice
fields.Description: Optional boolean value. If specified and equals true, related invoice will be automatically updated (or created) to match selected registration type and extra cost options.

fields.Name: EventRegistrationType
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "EventRegistrationType". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/EventRegistrationTypes. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: IsEnabled
fields.Description: Indicates whether this registration type is enabled

fields.Name: EventId
fields.Description: Identifier of event related to the registration type.

fields.Name: Description
fields.Description: Plain text description for the event registration type.

fields.Name: BasePrice
fields.Description: Base price registrant pays for this registration type.

fields.Name: UseTaxScopeSettings
fields.Description: Indicates whether account tax scope settings should be used to calculate final price.

fields.Name: RegistrationCode
fields.Description: Registration code required to apply for event with this registration type. This property has value only if Availability is CodeRequired.

fields.Name: AvailableForMembershipLevels
fields.Description: Which membership levels can apply for event. This property has value only if Availability is MembersOnly.

fields.Name: AvailableFrom
fields.Description: This registration type is available starting from this date. Can be null.

fields.Name: AvailableThrough
fields.Description: This registration type is available until this date. Can be null.

fields.Name: MaximumRegistrantsCount
fields.Description: Maximum number of registrants for this registration type.

fields.Name: CurrentRegistrantsCount
fields.Description: Current number of registrants for this registration type.

fields.Name: CancellationDaysBeforeEvent
fields.Description: In case if CancellationBehaviour = AllowUpToPeriodBeforeEvent, this field indicates the minimum number of days before the event that cancellations are allowed.

fields.Name: IsWaitlistEnabled
fields.Description: Indicated if registrant should be added to waitlist if registrations have reached their limit.

fields.Name: IsGuestRegistrationRequired
fields.Description: Indicates if guest registration is required.

fields.Name: Feature
fields.Description: Information about specific feature availability. REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/features/{featureId}. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: Allowed
fields.Description: Indicates whether the feature is allowed

fields.Name: Invoice
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "Invoice". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/invoices. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: CreatedDate
fields.Description: Date and time when the document was created.

fields.Name: UpdatedDate
fields.Description: Date and time when the document was last modified.  Could be null.

fields.Name: IsPaid
fields.Description: Indicates if the invoice is fully paid.

fields.Name: PaidAmount
fields.Description: Sum already paid for this invoice.

fields.Name: Memo
fields.Description: Internal note on invoice. Visible to administrators only.

fields.Name: PublicMemo
fields.Description: Comment on invoice. Visible to both administrators and the person being invoiced.

fields.Name: VoidedDate
fields.Description: When invoice is voided this field indicates date of void. Voided invoice does not affect balance. For regular invoices this field is null.

fields.Name: MembershipGroup
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "MembershipGroup". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/membergroups. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: MembershipLevel
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "MembershipLevel". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/membershiplevels. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: PublicCanApply
fields.Description: Indicates if non-member can apply for membership with this level.

fields.Name: Type
fields.Description: Indicates if membership level is individual or bundle.

fields.Name: BundleMembersLimit
fields.Description: Maximum number of bundle members. Empty for individuals.

fields.Name: MembershipFee
fields.Description: Price of being a member with this level of membership. Price is for RenewalPeriod.

fields.Name: MemberCanChangeToLevels
fields.Description: Member can switch from current level to one of levels from this list.

fields.Name: Order
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "Order". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/store/orders. PK=number (documented-soft).

fields.Name: Payment
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "Payment". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/payments. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: CreatedDate
fields.Description: Date and time when the document was created.

fields.Name: UpdatedDate
fields.Description: Date and time when the document was last modified.  Could be null.

fields.Name: Comment
fields.Description: Internal note on payment. Visible to administrators only.

fields.Name: PublicComment
fields.Description: Comment on payment. Visible to both administrators and payors.

fields.Name: AllocatedValue
fields.Description: Total amount allocated to another finance documents (invoices or refunds).

fields.Name: RefundedAmount
fields.Description: Amount of a refund assigned to the payment.

fields.Name: DonationId
fields.Description: Identifyer of Donation for payment of type DonationPayment.

fields.Name: PaymentMethodID
fields.Description: Identifier of the payment method, could be last digits of a credit card or cheque number, Visible to both administrators and donors/payees.

fields.Name: FieldValues
fields.Description: For each custom field you have added to your Wild Apricot database, the name of the field, its system code, and its value for this donation are returned. The system code is a unique field identifier that can be used instead of the field name to identify the field. As well, a number of system fields are returned.

fields.Name: PaymentAllocation
fields.Description: Thhis object describes how payment is allocated among invoices.. REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/paymentAllocations. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: Product
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "Product". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/store/products. PK=id (documented-soft).

fields.Name: Refund
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "Refund". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/refunds. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: CreatedDate
fields.Description: Date and time when the document was created.

fields.Name: UpdatedDate
fields.Description: Date and time when the document was last modified.  Could be null.

fields.Name: Comment
fields.Description: Internal note on refund. Visible to administrators only.

fields.Name: PublicComment
fields.Description: Comment on refund. Visible to both administrators and person being refunded.

fields.Name: SettledValue
fields.Description: Total amount allocated to another finance documents (payments or donations).

fields.Name: SavedSearch
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "SavedSearch". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/savedsearches. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: SentEmailRecipient
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "SentEmailRecipient". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/SentEmailRecipients. PK=ContactId (documented-soft).

fields.Name: ContactId
fields.Description: Contact identifier with used email address.

fields.Name: EventRegistrationId
fields.Description: Event regisration Id if the email was sent to an event attendee.

fields.Name: RecipientName
fields.Description: display name of recipient (Last, First names (if set) or Organization).

fields.Name: Tender
fields.Description: WildApricot Admin API record "Tender". REST resource /accounts/{accountId}/tenders. PK=Id (addressing-path+Id).

fields.Name: Url
fields.Description: API url to get item details

fields.Name: IsCustom
fields.Description: Indicates that this tender is created by account admin, otherwise the tender is built-in.
